<Color=red>Zora helm<Color=white> was placed in an actual
fish's stomach.

<Color=red>sky fish <Color=white>as a metaphor <unk[5:0]>leading to the

<unk[3:0:9]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>You never listen closely to my guidance,
which often results in these ridiculous
misunderstandings.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:258]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>听好了，希富弥……

本来<Color=red>卓拉头盔<Color=white>是作为赠与林克大人的礼物，
优娜大人打算亲自寻找的。
而当时提出“请交给我吧”的人，
希富弥……<unk[5:1]>是你自己吧？
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>优娜大人说这是为了领地的恩人林克大人，
希富弥，我能理解你被优娜大人的心意所触动。
也正因此，我才对你的表现抱有期待……
rows.TWzh:

好用來當成謝禮送給林克大人。
而那時自告奮勇要接下這件事的人……
希富彌，<unk[5:1]>不就是你自己嗎？
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>林克大人是領地的恩人，而優娜大人想親自報恩。
我明白希富彌你為此感動的心情。
正因為如此，我才期待你的表現……

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:258]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>Understood, Chroma?


Queen Yona originally intended to search
for Sir Link's <Color=red>Zora helm<Color=white> herself to present
to him in gratitude.
But someone insisted that she hand off
the task. "Leave it to me," that Zora said.
Who was it? Was it not...<unk[5:1]>you, Chroma?
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Look... I understand being moved by
Queen Yona's kind spirit and the domain's
gratitude for Sir Link.
In truth, I have full faith in you and your
own kind spirit. That is why I am so hard
on you.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:258]>リンク<Ruby={2:4}さま>様への ご<Ruby={4:8}おんがえ>恩返しのはずが…<unk[5:0]>
ご<Ruby={4:8}ほんにん>本人の<Ruby={2:2}て>手を<Ruby={2:6}わずら>煩わせるなど…
<unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:8}ほんらい>本来 <Ruby={2:6}わたし>私たちは<Ruby={4:8}はんせい>反省してしかるべきです！<unk[5:1]>
なのに そのニヤニヤ<Ruby={2:4}がお>顔はなんですか！？
あなたには <Ruby={6:10}いまいちど>今一度 <Ruby={4:8}じじゅう>侍従としてのありかたを
<Ruby={6:14}さいきょういく>再教育する<Ruby={4:8}ひつよう>必要が あるようですね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:258]>This was intended to be our opportunity
to honor Sir Link for his contributions.
Instead, we caused trouble for him.
<unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 48]>We have much to be sorry for! And yet...<unk[5:1]>
There it is. That inexplicable smirk upon
your face!
It seems it again falls on me to instruct
you in proper conduct for an attendant.
Listen carefully...

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>No...<unk[5:1]> It cannot be! I was so sure the
lectures would finally end!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:265]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>だまらっしゃい！<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:6}きょう>今日という<Ruby={4:6}きょう>今日は <Ruby={2:4}ゆる>許しませんからね！
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:265]><unk[4:0:16 65 110 103 114 121 95 48 49]>Enough tomfoolery!<unk[5:1]> I will not allow it!
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>This cannot be happening...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>实在让您见笑了……<unk[5:1]>
我会好好训斥希富弥的。
林克大人……<unk[5:0]>您方便的话，
不妨去找<Color=red>优娜<Color=white>大人聊聊。
除了头盔，<Color=red>优娜<Color=white>大人还在尝试
修复<Color=red>卓拉铠甲<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>我相信有了<Color=red>卓拉铠甲<Color=white>，
一定会给林克大人的旅途带来帮助的。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>不好意思，讓您見笑了……<unk[5:1]>
我會好好地管教希富彌的。
林克大人……<unk[5:0]>如果方便的話，
能不能請您和<Color=red>優娜<Color=white>大人聊聊呢？
除了頭盔之外，
<Color=red>優娜<Color=white>大人也在嘗試修復<Color=red>卓拉鎧甲<Color=white>，
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>我相信<Color=red>卓拉鎧甲<Color=white>一定能在
林克大人的旅途中派上用場。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]><Ruby={4:6}みぐる>見苦しいところを お<Ruby={2:2}み>見せしました…<unk[5:1]>
ヒフミには <Ruby={2:6}わたし>私から<Ruby={2:2}い>言い<Ruby={2:2}き>聞かせておきます
リンク<Ruby={2:4}さま>様… <unk[5:0]>よろしければ
<Color=red>ヨナ<Color=white><Ruby={2:4}さま>様とお<Ruby={2:4}はな>話しされてはいかがでしょう
<Color=red>ヨナ<Color=white><Ruby={2:4}さま>様は <Ruby={2:6}かぶと>兜とは<Ruby={2:4}べつ>別に
<Color=red>ゾーラの<Ruby={2:6}よろい>鎧<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:10}しゅうふく>修復を <Ruby={2:6}こころ>試みておられるのです
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]><Color=red>ゾーラの<Ruby={2:6}よろい>鎧<Color=white>があれば リンク<Ruby={2:4}さま>様の<Ruby={4:6}たびじ>旅路で
きっと<Ruby={2:4}やく>役に<Ruby={2:2}た>立つはずです
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>You witnessed something unseemly.<unk[5:1]>
Worry not, I intend to give Chroma a
stern warning.
Sir Link...<unk[5:1]> If you so please, will you speak
with <Color=red>Queen<Color=white> <Color=red>Yona<Color=white>?

Helm aside, <Color=red>Queen Yona<Color=white> is earnestly
trying to repair your <Color=red>Zora armor<Color=white>.

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 48]>As you are aware, the <Color=red>Zora armor<Color=white> should
prove quite useful on your journey.
